sentence: 这位制片人投资了好几部大片。
pinyin: Zhè wèi zhìpiànrén tóuzī le hǎo jǐ bù dà piàn.
english: This film producer has invested in several blockbusters.

meaning: 1. leisure; 2. free time; 3. unoccupied; 4. not in use
sentence: 他利用闲暇时间学吉他。
pinyin: Tā lìyòng xiánxiá shíjiān xué jítā.
english: He uses his leisure time to learn guitar.

meaning: 1. in ancient times; 2. in olden days
sentence: 古时候人们靠烛光照明。
pinyin: Gǔ shíhou rénmen kào zhúguāng zhàomíng.
english: In ancient times, people relied on candlelight for illumination.

meaning: 1. to set a time limit; 2. time limit; 3. deadline
sentence: 老师限期一周内交作业。
pinyin: Lǎoshī xiànqī yī zhōu nèi jiāo zuòyè.
english: The teacher set a one-week deadline for submitting the assignment.

sentence: 会议按既定议程顺利进行。
pinyin: Huìyì àn jìdìng yìchéng shùnlì jìnxíng.
english: The meeting proceeded smoothly according to the established agenda.

sentence: 他总是帮我想到细节，真贴心。
pinyin: Tā zǒng shì bāng wǒ xiǎngdào xìjié, zhēn tiēxīn.
english: He always thinks of the little details for me; he's really considerate.

sentence: 总统派特使前往谈判。
pinyin: Zǒngtǒng pài tèshǐ qiánwǎng tánpàn.
english: The president sent a special envoy to conduct negotiations.

sentence: 孩子们在院子里滚雪球玩。
pinyin: Háizimen zài yuànzi lǐ gǔn xuěqiú wán.
english: The kids are playing by rolling snowballs in the yard.

sentence: 那款被禁的游戏终于解禁了。
pinyin: Nà kuǎn bèi jìn de yóuxì zhōngyú jiějìn le.
english: That banned game has finally had its ban lifted.

sentence: 我家毗邻一个小公园，很方便。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā pílín yī gè xiǎo gōngyuán, hěn fāngbiàn.
english: My home is adjacent to a small park, which is very convenient.

sentence: 他从小就加入了学校的足球队。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù jiārù le xuéxiào de zúqiú duì.
english: He joined the school's soccer team from a young age.

sentence: 清除浏览器缓存后页面加载变快了。
pinyin: Qīngchú liúlǎnqì huǎncún hòu yèmiàn jiāzǎi biàn kuài le.
english: After clearing the browser cache, the page loads faster.

sentence: 地铁里没有信号，手机一直离线。
pinyin: Dìtiě lǐ méiyǒu xìnhào, shǒujī yīzhí lí xiàn.
english: There's no signal in the subway, so the phone stays offline the whole time.

meaning: 1. to station or garrison troops; 2. garrison
sentence: 边境附近长期有驻军保卫安全。
pinyin: Biānjìng fùjìn chángqī yǒu zhùjūn bǎowèi ānquán.
english: There are troops permanently garrisoned near the border to maintain security.

sentence: 这个矿区已经开采了二十多年。
pinyin: Zhège kuàngqū yǐjīng kāicǎi le èrshí duō nián.
english: This mining area has been in operation for over twenty years.

sentence: 程序里的常量不能在运行时改变。
pinyin: Chénxù lǐ de chángliàng bù néng zài yùnxíng shí gǎibiàn.
english: Constants in a program cannot be changed at runtime.

meaning: 1. to explain; 2. to expound; 3. to interpret; 4. elucidation
sentence: 老师耐心阐释了这首诗的含义。
pinyin: Lǎoshī nàixīn chǎnshì le zhè shǒu shī de hányì.
english: The teacher patiently explained the meaning of this poem.

sentence: 周末那家购物中心人很多。
pinyin: Zhōumò nà jiā gòuwù zhōngxīn rén hěn duō.
english: That shopping center is very crowded on weekends.

sentence: 我太公年轻时是个木匠，手艺很好。
pinyin: Wǒ tài gōng nián qīng shí shì gè mù jiàng, shǒu yì hěn hǎo.
english: My great-grandfather was a carpenter when he was young and was very skilled.

meaning: (of a married couple) to have intercourse; (literary) to share the sam
sentence: 医生建议术后一个月内避免同房。
pinyin: Yī shēng jiàn yì shù hòu yī gè yuè nèi bì miǎn tóng fáng.
english: The doctor advised avoiding intercourse for one month after the surgery.

sentence: 本次选举共有五位参选人，竞争激烈。
pinyin: Běn cì xuǎn jǔ gòng yǒu wǔ wèi cān xuǎn rén, jìng zhēng jī liè.
english: There are five candidates in this election, and the competition is fierce.

sentence: 这篇文章用文言写成，读起来有点难。
pinyin: Zhè piān wén zhāng yòng wén yán xiě chéng, dú qǐ lái yǒu diǎn nán.
english: This article is written in Classical Chinese, so it's a bit difficult to read.

sentence: 老师让我们把数据整理成一张统计表。
pinyin: Lǎo shī ràng wǒ men bǎ shù jù zhěng lǐ chéng yī zhāng tǒng jì biǎo.
english: The teacher asked us to organize the data into a statistical table.

meaning: (music) to change key; modulation; (of an employee) to be transferred
sentence: 这首歌在副歌部分转调了，听起来更有力。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē zài fù gē bù fen zhuǎn diào le, tīng qǐ lái gèng yǒu lì.
english: This song modulates key in the chorus section, making it sound more powerful.

sentence: 网站上有常见问题页面，大多数疑问都能找到答案。
pinyin: Wǎng zhàn shàng yǒu cháng jiàn wèn tí yè miàn, dà duō shù yí wèn dōu néng zhǎo dào dá àn.
english: The website has a FAQ page where you can find answers to most questions.

sentence: 明治维新使日本迅速走向现代化。
pinyin: Míng zhì Wéi xīn shǐ Rì běn xùn sù zǒu xiàng xiàn dài huà.
english: The Meiji Restoration rapidly led Japan toward modernization.

sentence: 经济发展带来了物质文明，但精神层面也不能忽视。
pinyin: Jīng jì fā zhǎn dài lái le wù zhì wén míng, dàn jīng shén céng miàn yě bù néng hū shì.
english: Economic development has brought material culture, but the spiritual dimension should not be overlooked.

meaning: to have an audience (with the Emperor)
sentence: 大臣们每天清晨都要进宫朝见皇帝。
pinyin: Dà chén men měi tiān qīng chén dōu yào jìn gōng cháo jiàn huáng dì.
english: The ministers had to enter the palace every morning to have an audience with the Emperor.

sentence: 报社派通讯员去灾区采访最新情况。
pinyin: Bào shè pài tōng xùn yuán qù zāi qū cǎi fǎng zuì xīn qíng kuàng.
english: The newspaper sent a correspondent to the disaster area to report on the latest developments.

sentence: 他在退休前出版了多部重要论著。
pinyin: Tā zài tuì xiū qián chū bǎn le duō bù zhòng yào lùn zhù.
english: He published several important treatises before retiring.

meaning: Japanese limited company; corporation; public company; Ltd; p.l.c.; Co
sentence: 这家株式会社在东京证交所上市已有二十年。
pinyin: Zhè jiā zhū shì huì shè zài Dōng jīng zhèng jiāo suǒ shàng shì yǐ yǒu èr shí nián.
english: This Japanese corporation has been listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange for twenty years.

sentence: 他请了家教给孩子进行一对一辅导。
pinyin: Tā qǐng le jiā jiào gěi hái zi jìn xíng yī duì yī fǔ dǎo.
english: He hired a tutor to give his child one-on-one tutoring.

meaning: participant in a survey; interviewee; respondent
sentence: 调查显示，大多数受访者对新政策表示支持。
pinyin: Diào chá xiǎn shì, dà duō shù shòu fǎng zhě duì xīn zhèng cè biǎo shì zhī chí.
english: The survey shows that most respondents support the new policy.

sentence: 一架侦察机飞越边境，引发了紧张局势。
pinyin: Yī jià zhēn chá jī fēi yuè biān jìng, yǐn fā le jǐn zhāng jú shì.
english: A surveillance aircraft flew over the border, triggering a tense situation.

sentence: 她上周去看了一场百老汇音乐剧，非常享受。
pinyin: Tā shàng zhōu qù kàn le yī chǎng Bǎi lǎo huì yīn yuè jù, fēi cháng xiǎng shòu.
english: She went to see a Broadway musical last week and enjoyed it very much.

sentence: 目下公司正在招人，有兴趣可以投简历。
pinyin: Mù xià gōng sī zhèng zài zhāo rén, yǒu xìng qù kě yǐ tóu jiǎn lì.
english: At present the company is hiring — feel free to send in your résumé if you're interested.

meaning: joint signatures (on a letter or declaration)
sentence: 超过一千名学生联署请愿，要求改善校园设施。
pinyin: Chāo guò yī qiān míng xué shēng lián shǔ qǐng yuàn, yāo qiú gǎi shàn xiào yuán shè shī.
english: More than a thousand students signed a joint petition demanding better campus facilities.

sentence: 各省市代表团聚集北京参加年度会议。
pinyin: Gè shěng shì dài biǎo tuán jù jí Běi jīng cān jiā nián dù huì yì.
english: Delegations from various provinces and cities gathered in Beijing for the annual meeting.

meaning: to be involved in politics; participation in politics
sentence: 越来越多的年轻人希望通过参政来改变社会。
pinyin: Yuè lái yuè duō de nián qīng rén xī wàng tōng guò cān zhèng lái gǎi biàn shè huì.
english: More and more young people hope to change society by getting involved in politics.

sentence: 他换了一部新智能手机，拍照效果好多了。
pinyin: Tā huàn le yī bù xīn zhì néng shǒu jī, pāi zhào xiào guǒ hǎo duō le.
english: He got a new smartphone and the camera quality is much better.

sentence: 这起案件涉及审判权归属问题，两地法院都主张管辖。
pinyin: Zhè qǐ àn jiàn shè jí shěn pàn quán guī shǔ wèn tí, liǎng dì fǎ yuàn dōu zhǔ zhāng guǎn xiá.
english: This case involves a question of which jurisdiction holds judicial authority, with courts in both places claiming it.

sentence: 他们在卧室里尝试了口活。
pinyin: Tā men zài wò shì lǐ cháng shì le kǒu huó.
english: They tried oral sex in the bedroom.

sentence: 这个月的话费怎么这么高？
pinyin: Zhège yuè de huà fèi zěnme zhème gāo?
english: Why is this month's phone bill so high?

sentence: 他不太擅长交际，不喜欢聚会。
pinyin: Tā bù tài shàncháng jiāo jì, bù xǐhuān jùhuì.
english: He's not great at socializing and doesn't like parties.

sentence: 我的鼠标坏了，需要换一个。
pinyin: Wǒ de shǔ biāo huài le, xū yào huàn yī gè.
english: My mouse is broken and I need to replace it.

sentence: 浴室的马桶坏了，需要修一下。
pinyin: Yùshì de mǎtǒng huài le, xūyào xiū yīxià.
english: The toilet in the bathroom is broken and needs to be fixed.

meaning: 1. to roll; 2. (to do sth) in a loop; 3. to scroll (computing); 4. to
sentence: 球从坡上滚动下来了。
pinyin: Qiú cóng pō shang gǔndòng xià lái le.
english: The ball rolled down the slope.

sentence: 厨房里的煤气管道漏气了。
pinyin: Chúfáng lǐ de méiqì guǎndào lòu qì le.
english: The gas pipe in the kitchen is leaking.

sentence: 施工现场的电线裸露在外面，很危险。
pinyin: Shīgōng xiànchǎng de diànxiàn luǒlù zài wàimiàn, hěn wēixiǎn.
english: The wires at the construction site are exposed and very dangerous.

sentence: 酒店特意为尊贵的客人准备了礼品。
pinyin: Jiǔdiàn tèyì wèi zūnguì de kèrén zhǔnbèile lǐpǐn.
english: The hotel specially prepared gifts for its honored guests.
